data.title: CZ: Will post photos of pet dog within 3 hours
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: CZ posted on the X platform announcing that he would release photos of his pet dog within 3 hours, which is expected to be 8 pm Dubai time.

data.title: LBank will launch FULLSEND U-margined perpetual contract
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, LBank will launch the FULLSEND U-based perpetual contract at 21:00 (SGT) on February 13, 2025, with a maximum leverage of 50 times.

data.title: Mira Network announces the launch of "FINAL Drop" and launches whitelist checker
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News AI infrastructure Mira Network announced the launch of "FINAL Drop" and launched the whitelist checker. If the participant has been included in the Drop 1 or Drop 2 whitelist, he can join the third round without re-joining the whitelist. The qualifications can be queried in the whitelist checker. Mira Network also stated that the node delegator plan will be able to contribute to the infrastructure by renting computing resources from node operators, and running a verification node to verify AI output can earn rewards.

data.title: Teneo Protocol Completes $3 Million Seed Round Led by RockawayX and Borderless
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The decentralized social media data access protocol Teneo Protocol announced the completion of a $3 million seed round of financing, led by RockawayX and Borderless, with participation from Generative Ventures and others. The new funds will support Teneo in achieving its mission of revolutionizing the data economy by rewarding users who unlock public social media data. (Chainwire)

data.title: Taurus Expands Tokenization Services to Solana Network
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Taurus, which provides digital asset infrastructure for financial institutions such as Deutsche Bank, Credit Suisse and Santander, has expanded its digital asset custody and tokenization services to the Solana network. (The Block)

data.title: Cookie DAO: Snapshot taken, stakers can vote on Cookie DAO Constitution
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Cookie DAO announced on the X platform that the snapshot has been taken and the next stage of Cookie DAO decentralization is ready to begin. $COOKIE stakers are now eligible to vote on the Cookie DAO Constitution. The vote will last for 72 hours. The voting power depends on the number of $COOKIE staked. 1 $COOKIE staked is equal to 1 vote.

data.title: Metaplanet Secures $26 Million Bond Financing to Acquire Bitcoin
data.description: According to Odaily, Japanese publicly traded company Metaplanet has successfully raised 4 billion yen (approximately $26 million) through the issuance of 0% unsecured ordinary bonds. The funds will be used to purchase additional Bitcoin.

data.title: AscendEX will launch MyShell Token (SHELL)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: AscendEX (formerly BitMax) will launch MyShell Token (SHELL) at 22:00 on February 13, opening the SHELL/USDT trading pair, and is now open for deposits.

data.title: Market Sentiment Remains Cautiously Optimistic Amid Price Fluctuations
data.description: According to Odaily, Greeks.live macro researcher Adam has released a community briefing indicating that the community maintains a cautiously optimistic outlook on the market. However, there is concern over the price fluctuations within the $94,000 to $98,000 range. While some traders anticipate a rise to $100,000, significant resistance levels and algorithmic trading activities are hindering sustained price increases. Despite the current price pressure, some traders are holding $96,000 call options set to expire next week.

data.title: Aethir announces innovation initiative Aethir Forge
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, decentralized cloud infrastructure provider Aethir announced the launch of the innovative program Aethir Forge, which aims to strengthen the community and expand the influence of the Aethir ecosystem in the fields of AI, games and Web3. 
It is reported that Aethir Forge will promote the adoption of Aethir's decentralized cloud and increase brand publicity, awareness and community development. At the same time, it will also expand Aethir's influence in key regions and build a developer community to explore how to provide them with GPU computing support.
